content.raw:
Contact Kris

Want to book a talk, workshop, collaboration, interview, or creative AI project? Email is the fastest way to reach me.

Email Kris

Email: feelmoreplants@gmail.com

Please include a bit about what you are working on, your timeline, and the best way to reach you.
